source_layout: 4x2 atlas, seven occupied cells and one empty cell
processing: border-sampled soft matte, despill and alpha conversion
prompt_summary: Seven full-body survivor game pictograms in consistent three-quarter isometric dark-arcade style: Mira ranger, Dante gunslinger, Bruna berserker, Kael swordsman, Elio mage, Nina tamer with Briciola, and Rocco werewolf; no text, uniform chroma-key background.
